name: bash-leash-bypass-fixes
details: Implement Option 2: Token-based detection for find and xargs bypass vectors

tasks.name: Add checkFindCommand
tasks.details: Add method to detect find -delete and find -exec [dangerous] patterns, extract and validate search paths

tasks.name: Add checkXargsCommand
tasks.details: Add method to detect xargs with dangerous commands, skip xargs options properly

tasks.name: Integrate into checkDangerousCommand
tasks.details: Call the new methods before DANGEROUS_COMMANDS check

tasks.name: Build and test
tasks.details: Run npm build, test against the 4 bypass patterns
